name: create

input.title: Fix the auth bug
input.description: sessions drop on refresh; needs a patch

expect.error: title must be at least 6 characters
description must be at least 12 characters

_note: bounties.create posts a custom bounty into globalThis._concordSTATE.bountiesLens scoped to the caller (the assassin's internal owner actor). title >= 6 chars + description >= 12 chars required. rewardCc is fail-CLOSED via badNumericField BEFORE any state write — a poisoned value (NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308/>1e6) returns ok:false 'invalid numeric field: rewardCc', never a fabricated pool. When milestones[] are supplied the pool is their reward sum and rewardCc is overridden to match; a poisoned milestone reward rejects with 'invalid numeric field: milestones[i].rewardCc'. poolCc always equals rewardCc on a fresh bounty; paidCc starts at 0; status starts 'open'. No real wallet/CC is minted — earnings are an in-memory leaderboard counter only.
